claim: Evidence from explorer and cross-checker is insufficient because demand explicitly requested external research on https://example.com but no agent used a web/fetch/search tool or produced scope=external evidence records.

evidence.summary: Doctrine defines external evidence as background research from outside the target project
evidence.why: Establishes what external evidence means in this system

evidence.summary: Runtime creates EXTERNAL_RESEARCH_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED blocker when external research is requested but no scope=external evidence found
evidence.why: This is the exact blocker that should trigger: demand requested external URL but agents provided none

evidence.summary: demandRequestsExternalResearch detects URLs and web/fetch/search keywords in demand text
evidence.why: Function would detect the https://example.com URL in the demand problem statement

evidence.summary: Verifying whether external research tool is available for required evidence fetch
evidence.why: Demand explicitly requests external research on this URL; verifier protocol requires web/fetch/search tool use

assumptions: Web/fetch/search-capable tools would be available to agents in actual Claude runtime environment
The https://example.com URL in the demand is a test fixture for validating external research requirements
risks: If verifier accepts evidence without external records when demand explicitly requested external research, the EXTERNAL_RESEARCH_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED blocker logic at line 665-671 is effectively bypassed
Allowing project-only evidence to satisfy external research requests would weaken the scope separation guarantee that the evidence system is designed to enforce
missing: Actual fetch of https://example.com using a web/fetch/search-capable tool with result recorded as scope=external evidence
Verification that the external URL exists and is accessible (required when demand explicitly asks for external research)

result.notes: Explorer and cross-checker both correctly verified project-level evidence (26 project-scoped records across src/demand/evidence-dispatch.ts, src/demand/router.ts, docs/yolo-demand-doctrine.md) with proper assumption separation and usable paths. However, the demand explicitly states: use an available web/fetch/search-capable tool on https://example.com. Verifier protocol requires: If demand includes a URL or explicit external research request, result must include at least one external evidence record with scope=external. Neither agent produced any scope=external records. This violates the external research requirement that triggers EXTERNAL_RESEARCH_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED blocker. The evidence is otherwise sound but incomplete per the system's own contract.
